history.content: Startup state is partially degraded: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable, so there’s no live visibility into active items or upcoming jobs from this snapshot. Today’s notes highlight solid memory hygiene (correct no-op syncs when signal is low/intermittent) and capture a recent failure mode where an X→Telegram flow hung after an unknown tool call without immediate fallback, leaving a plan step stuck. Where things left off: focus should be on graceful fallback handling, explicit plan-step closure, and keeping context compaction lean and accurate.
